arts.ttl: Serie A | Venezia v Verona: Match Preview
arts.sum: The picturesque Stadio Pier Luigi Penzo will host a pivotal clash in the Serie A relegation battle on Monday evening, as Venezia welcome regional rivals Hellas Verona. Both Veneto clubs find themselves entrenched in the fight for top-flight survival, with the visitors currently four points ahead of their 19th-placed hosts. The post Serie A | Venezia v Verona: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: “Cande Can Be a Starter”: Di Francesco’s Preview of Venezia’s Derby Challenge
arts.sum: Venezia head coach Eusebio Di recently addressed the media regarding the team's upcoming match against Verona in the Serie A derby. The match is set to take place on Monday evening, marking a significant event in the 22nd round of the league.
